---
title: "John William Parker sr."
---

## John William Parker sr.

**Dates:** (1792-1870)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

He was  printer to Cambridge University Press and the publisher of CMY's early bestsellers of the 1850s.  After the death of his son John William Parker, jr.,  in 1860 he continued in partnership with William Butler Bourn but then sold the firm to Longmans in 1863. The firm should not be confused with that of John Henry Parker of Oxford, who published <i>Kenneth</i>. [DLB 106]

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 25th 1864
- Letter from Oct 13th 1863
- Letter from Oct. 9. 1863
- Letter from Oct 7th 1863
- Letter from Aug 11th 1863
- Letter from Decr 2nd [1862]
- Letter from Novr 24th 1862
- Letter from Novr 21st 1862
- Letter from Oct 16th [1862]
- Letter from Novr 22nd 1860
- Letter from Novr 20th [1860]
- Letter from March 17th [1856]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
